mapper.select:
select distinct pbarcode from t_scm_pallet where useyn = 'N' and pbarcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from V_STOCKINFO where upper(factory) = upper(#{factory}) and upper(storage) = upper(#{storage}) and barcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from V_STOCKINFO where upper(factory) = upper(#{factory}) and barcode in
#{barcode}

SELECT i.CMB_ITEMTYPE FROM T_MI_ITEM i INNER JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE b ON i.ITEMCODE = b.ITEMCODE INNER JOIN T_SCM_PALLET p ON p.ITEMCODE = b.ITEMCODE WHERE b.BARCODE in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from T_WMS_WORKLOCATION where (UPPER(FACTORY) != upper(#{workfactory}) or upper(storage) !=upper(#{workstorage})) and barcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from t_wms_worklocation where useyn = 'Y' and source = 'WIPINPUT' and barcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from t_wms_worklocation where useyn = 'Y' and source = 'PRODUCTION' and upper(storage) = upper(#{wstorage}) and barcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from t_wms_work where useyn = 'Y' and barcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from v_stockinfo where storage != 'REDCAGE' AND barcode in
#{barcode}

select distinct barcode from v_stockinfo where storage = 'REDCAGE' AND barcode in
#{barcode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_scm_barcode (barcode,kind,madate,sdate,itemcode,itemname,qty,totalqty,ymdhms,useyn,custname,labeltype,LASTSTATUS,LASTQTY, oitemcode, LASTFACTORY, FACTORY) values(#{barcode},'WMS', #{date}, #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{itemname}, #{qty}, #{qty},TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'Y','WOOBOTECH', 'PDA',#{laststatus}, #{qty}, #{oitemcode},'WBTA', 'WBTA')
